predictions.title: 1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.
predictions.body: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
predictions.summary: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB.

predictions.title: Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.
predictions.body: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
predictions.summary: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window.

predictions.title: Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.
predictions.body: **Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.** Successful attacks are up +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE from PR body) reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
